response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Lyrics and spoken dialogue matches the reference JSON closely.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the lyrics from the reference JSON to align with vocal audio cues, then continued with manual Japanese and English transcription for the talk segment.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully around musical beats and spoken intervals to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: One, two, three, let's go!
subtitles.english: One, two, three, let's go!

subtitles.original: Took a bet on love, it's better than I coulda dreamed
subtitles.english: Took a bet on love, it's better than I coulda dreamed

subtitles.original: Look at what we've done, we're too extreme
subtitles.english: Look at what we've done, we're too extreme

subtitles.original: Pour me your favorite drink, so much until we sink
subtitles.english: Pour me your favorite drink, so much until we sink

subtitles.original: Down to the bottom, don't wanna miss a thing
subtitles.english: Down to the bottom, don't wanna miss a thing

subtitles.original: The track we're on might crash, oh, what am I to do?
subtitles.english: The track we're on might crash, oh, what am I to do?

subtitles.original: Rushing in, ignoring old avenues
subtitles.english: Rushing in, ignoring old avenues

subtitles.original: Race through the night, my guiding light
subtitles.english: Race through the night, my guiding light

subtitles.original: Sparkling, I'm right here with you
subtitles.english: Sparkling, I'm right here with you

subtitles.english: With the beat of my heart, just can't get enough

subtitles.english: Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay

subtitles.original: Carbonated Love
subtitles.english: Carbonated Love

subtitles.original: HiRyS! It's IRyS from Hololive English, Promise!
subtitles.english: HiRyS! It's IRyS from Hololive English, Promise!

subtitles.original: Look at who we have here, aren't they so cute? かわいすね！こいつら！
subtitles.english: Look at who we have here, aren't they so cute? They're so cute, aren't they!

subtitles.original: やー、頑張ってね。踊って、一緒に踊っていただいたんで、わーい、嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Yeah, thank you for working hard and dancing together with me. Yay, I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: And, uh, before we, you know, get into all sorts of things. First off, please use the hashtag...
subtitles.english: And, uh, before we, you know, get into all sorts of things. First off, please use the hashtag...

subtitles.original: IRySBday2026... Oh, this way.
subtitles.english: IRySBday2026... Oh, this way.

subtitles.original: IRySBday2026! こちらのハッシュタグでぜひ、ぜひツイートしてくださいね、感想など。
subtitles.english: IRySBday2026! Please tweet using this hashtag, let me know your thoughts!

subtitles.original: If you have anything you want to talk about this live, please use the hashtag. These IRySers will definitely get on their phones later on too, to tweet with the hashtag.
subtitles.english: If you have anything you want to talk about this live, please use the hashtag. These IRySers will definitely get on their phones later on too, to tweet with the hashtag.

subtitles.original: And... have you guys noticed something different? なんか、なんかIRySいつもと見た目違うっしょ？
subtitles.english: And... have you guys noticed something different? Doesn't IRyS look a bit different from usual?

subtitles.original: どう？ レースクイーン！
subtitles.english: What do you think? Race queen!

subtitles.original: あ、興奮してる。あ、they... they look very excited. Yeah, they're going... they're going mad, yes.
subtitles.english: Ah, they're excited. They... they look very excited. Yeah, they're going... they're going mad, yes.

subtitles.original: それぐらい、素晴らしいっしょ？ Finally, the race queen outfit is real!
subtitles.english: Isn't it wonderful? Finally, the race queen outfit is real!

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: いや、いいね。ありがとうございます。サクラじゃないよ！
subtitles.english: Ah, nice. Thank you so much. They're not paid actors!

subtitles.original: Alrighty then! Uh, first off though, let's get started with introducing the merch, the goods!
subtitles.english: Alrighty then! Uh, first off though, let's get started with introducing the merch, the goods!

subtitles.original: Yes, here is the line-up this time. Yes, introducing merch pretty early on this time. It's supposed to pop out...
subtitles.english: Yes, here is the line-up this time. Yes, introducing merch pretty early on this time. It's supposed to pop out...

subtitles.original: この辺かな？ あ、はい！
subtitles.english: Around here? Oh, yes!

subtitles.original: グッズは今回こちらになります！
subtitles.english: Here are the merch items for this time!

subtitles.original: Yes, the IRyS Birthday Celebration 2026! あ、言えた。誕生日記念2026！
subtitles.english: Yes, the IRyS Birthday Celebration 2026! Ah, I could say it. Birthday Celebration 2026!

subtitles.original: Alright, let me introduce the goods one by one. First off, there's this one.
subtitles.english: Alright, let me introduce the goods one by one. First off, there's this one.

subtitles.original: はい、ガイリスも喜んでるね、yes. First up, we have the Acrylic Diorama StandRyS (Acrylic Diorama Stand).
subtitles.english: Yes, the GuyRyS are happy too. First up, we have the Acrylic Diorama StandRyS (Acrylic Diorama Stand).
